org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ContainerRuntimeData

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ContainerRuntimeData

  • public class ContainerRuntimeData
extends java.lang.Object
    The runtime data of a running container.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ContainerName name()
      Gets the ERSAP canonical name.
      long numRequests()
      Gets the sum of all requests received by all the services running in the container.
      java.util.Set<ServiceRuntimeData> services()
      Gets the runtime report of all the services running on the container.
      java.time.LocalDateTime snapshotTime()
      Gets the local time when the runtime data was collected.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • name

        public ContainerName name()
        Gets the ERSAP canonical name.
        Returns:
        the canonical name

      • snapshotTime

        public java.time.LocalDateTime snapshotTime()
        Gets the local time when the runtime data was collected.
        Returns:
        the snapshot time of the report

      • numRequests

        public long numRequests()
        Gets the sum of all requests received by all the services running in the container.
        Returns:
        the total number of requests received by the services of the container

      • services

        public java.util.Set<ServiceRuntimeData> services()
        Gets the runtime report of all the services running on the container.
        Returns:
        the runtime data of the services
